## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue in the summary above
- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit + integration where applicable)
- [ ] TypeScript types regenerated (`make types`) if the API schema changed
- [ ] ADR written in `docs/adr/` if this PR makes an architectural decision
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff — no debug code, no commented-out blocks, no TODOs without a ticket
- [ ] `.env` was NOT accidentally committed (check `git diff --cached` before merging)
- [ ] CI passes (lint, tests, build)
